ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polylines" (
  "polyline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polyline */,
  "points" TEXT /* Array of coordinates representing the polyline */,
  "stroke_color" TEXT /* Hex color value for the polyline */,
  "stroke_opacity" REAL /* Opacity of the polyline from 0 (transparent) to 1 (opaque) */,
  "stroke_weight" REAL /* Thickness of the polyline */,
  "clickable" INTEGER /* Defines if the polyline is clickable */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the polyline */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the polyline was created */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated geographical area */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the polyline */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the polyline was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the polyline is visible to all users */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the polyline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polyline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polylines_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polylines_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., city planner, engineer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the project */,
  "stakeholders" TEXT /* List of stakeholders involved in the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects_polylines" (
  "project_polyline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project-polyline association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "polyline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated polyline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_polyline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_polylines_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_polylines_polyline_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyline_id") REFERENCES polylines ("polyline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographical_areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the area */,
  "boundaries" TEXT /* Array of coordinates defining the boundaries of the area */,
  "area_type" TEXT /* Type of geographical area (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "area_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area manager */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the area */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the area was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographical_areas_area_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment relates to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user this permission applies to */,
  "can_create" INTEGER /* Whether the user can create new items */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit existing items */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the user can delete items */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view items */,
  "can_export" INTEGER /* Whether the user can export data */,
  "can_share" INTEGER /* Whether the user can share data */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the action was performed */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates if the action was successful */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is for */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., project update, comment) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related item (e.g., project ID, comment ID) */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification is important */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the notification */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
